zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing於大約1152年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡福洛-賽吉馬丁時，她的父親Robert I De Wavrin3歲，母親Adeline de Guînes-5歲。她於大約1175年與Baudouin II de Bailleul在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1219年10月在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德貝爾爾享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing于大约1152年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡福洛-賽吉馬丁时，她的父亲Robert I De Wavrin3岁，母亲Adeline de Guînes-5岁。她于大约1175年与Baudouin II de Bailleul在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1219年10月在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德貝爾爾享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wavrin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing was born about 1152, in Cavron-Saint-Martin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Robert I De Wavrin, was 3 and her mother, Adeline de Guînes, was -5. She married Baudouin II de Bailleul about 1175, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in October 1219, in Bailleul, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing est née environ 1152, à Cavron-Saint-Martin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Robert I De Wavrin, avait 3 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Guînes, avait -5 ans. Elle a épousé Baudouin II de Bailleul environ 1175, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1219, à Bailleul, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing um 1152 in Cavron-Saint-Martin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert I De Wavrin 3 und ihre Mutter Adeline de Guînes -5. Sie hat um 1175 in Frankreich Baudouin II de Bailleul geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1219 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Bailleul, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing è nata il circa 1152 nel Cavron-Saint-Martin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Robert I De Wavrin, aveva 3 anni e sua madre, Adeline de Guînes, aveva -5 anni. Lei sposato Baudouin II de Bailleul circa 1175, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1219, nel Bailleul, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing(이)가 대략 1152년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 카브론-세인트-마틴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert I De Wavrin(은)는 3세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeline de Guînes(은)는 -5세였다. 그녀는 대략 1175년 프랑스에서 Baudouin II de Bailleul(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1219년 10월 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 베이레우에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing nasceu aproximadamente 1152, em Cavron-Saint-Martin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Robert I De Wavrin, tinha 3 anos e sua mãe, Adeline de Guînes, tinha -5 anos. Ela casou-se com Baudouin II de Bailleul aproximadamente 1175, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1219, em Bailleul, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing родилась около 1152 г. в местности каврон-сеинт-мартинь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert I De Wavrin было 3 года, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Guînes, -5. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baudouin II de Bailleul около 1175 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла октябрь 1219 г. в местности беиллеул, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Wavrin Héritière De Fenaing nació aproximadamente 1152, en Cavron-Saint-Martin, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Robert I De Wavrin, tenía 3 años y su mamá, Adeline de Guînes, tenía -5 años. Se casó con Baudouin II de Bailleul aproximadamente 1175, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1219, en Bailleul, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 68 años.
